generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the cycloidal gearbox of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time angular position data streamed via MQTT from motor position encoder"
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time angular position data streamed via MQTT from secondary position encoder behind gearbox"
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Real-time input current (I_M) data streamed via MQTT from current sensor"
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from motor current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from secondary position encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from position data using differentiation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque output from motor dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model combining Coulomb and viscous friction components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for low-velocity effects"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model for dynamic friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for complex friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model of permanent magnet synchronous motor and cycloidal gearbox for torque and velocity calculation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for metadata management of the digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for system structure and behavior definition"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink simulation environment for dynamic friction and motor/gearbox modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for standardized metadata management"
    DTDFVocab:enables AASMetadataService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical to virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for integrated data display and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Structural modeling service using SysML BDD and IBD"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStructureInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of white-box and black-box friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelOptimizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of data traces and model outputs in unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataComparisonInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated analysis of physical relationships to enhance robot motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction
]

instance AASMetadataService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Metadata management service via Asset Administration Shells"
    DTDFVocab:provides AASMetadataInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data streaming service using MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataStreamingInsight
]

instance FrictionModelOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized friction model parameters for dynamic friction compensation"
]

instance DataComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from comparing simulated vs measured data to optimize parameters for dynamic friction compensation"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy based on friction model results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemStructureInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural insights from SysML BDD and IBD modeling"
]

instance AASMetadataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metadata insights from Asset Administration Shell"
]

instance DataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights from real-time data streaming via MQTT"
]

instance SINUMERIK840DController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller driving the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the drive train of the first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component transforming rotational energy to torque output"
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment containing all components of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    base:contains SINUMERIK840DController, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent, MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with physical system data streams; all data processing and model updates occur continuously during robot operation without fixed intervals, enabling live friction model refinement."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of structural SysML models, Simulink-based simulation models, live sensor data via MQTT, and processing components that generate data traces; visualization occurs in a unified dashboard where all elements are linked for traceability of data origins and computational processes."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') with continuous data collection and model refinement during active robot use to account for wear, tool changes, and application-specific variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated and measured data; multi-physics-aware friction models validated against real-time operational data to ensure accuracy in motion control, with error quantification via comparison of simulated vs. reference torque/angular velocity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow; no other network protocols specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for industrial digital twins and SysML for systems engineering modeling as per industry best practices."
]
